prestazioni: B58B30C (3.0L inline-6) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer, and 88mm exducer, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a Tomei 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with dual 110mm outlets for optimized spool and top-end flow

Full fuel system overhaul featuring a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines, a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors (2,200cc/min) calibrated via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder trims for the B58’s direct/injector hybrid system

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, 8kg/mm front and 12kg/mm rear springs, and custom valving for the Supra’s multi-link rear suspension, paired with SuperPro polyurethane bushings (part #SPF1004K) for the front control arms and rear subframe to eliminate compliance under hard acceleration
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a duckbill rear wing with adjustable Gurney flap (3D-printed from PETG for weight savings)

Custom front bumper lip from Seibon Carbon with integrated LED DRLs (Lux H8 5000K) and a functional central air intake duct feeding the B58’s intercooler, paired with a carbon fiber hood (Seibon Type-20) featuring a 3-inch cowl scoop for heat extraction

Interior roll cage from Custom Cages (FIA-spec 8.521.1) with bolt-in rear strut brace and integrated harness bar, wrapped in Alcantara (Autostyle AS-1000) with red contrast stitching, paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub
